stemHtml:
Which of the listed containers is acceptable for loading in a cargo compartment with a maximum permissible running load of 630 kg/m?

Container W (base dimensions 1.1 m x 1.1 m) loaded with 700 kg.
Container X (base dimensions 1.1 m x 1.1 m) loaded with 760 kg.
Container Y (base dimensions 1.2 m x 1.2 m) loaded with 700 kg.
Container Z (base dimensions 1.2 m x 1.2 m) loaded with 760 kg.
